TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ji'an a sakuwan ku Hualien. kumud nu kalesakan, 62.65 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 0 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 0.68 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 78,633 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 29,613 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 14,299 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 18%(Pangcah, Truku) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. nikasakuwakuwan Ji'an mala 18 a cuwen atu 23 ku niyazu' kina 23 a niyazu'sa, Natawran , Pukpuk , Lidaw , Mabuwakay , Cikasuwan , Isaetipan pahikukian , Isawalian pahikukian , Taracan , Citekudan , Cikeliwan , Atonan , Ciripunan , Sarad , Kungkung , Hacining , Fulufuluan , Alang gnaalu , Alang mkibuhw , Alang kiyumi , Alang miyamay , Buner , Sirakesay , Ciyibangcalay . Ji'an/Yusinu (ťėŅÁĺéŤ™ě:CikasuanÔľõŤáļÁĀ£Ť©Ī:Kiat-an-hiongÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:gidňč onňä hiongňä,śĶ∑ťôłŤÖĒ:gid onňč hiongňč) . Ji'an/Yusinu , pangangan ku Cikasuan tu Pangcah/Amis, panagangan ku Kiat-an-hiong tu Taywan a tademaw, pangangan ku gidňč onňä hiongňä tu se-sing-cang a kamu nu ngayngay , pangangan ku gid onňč hiongňč tu hay-lu a kamu nu ngayngay , tini i Taywan Kalinku a kenis nuwalian tu saamisan, nuwamisan micapi tu Kalinku a tuse, Walibatu satipan belaw u Siu-lin-siang nutimulan matatules nu Sou-bung-siang . lalabuay a tademaw pakala tu 8.4 a mang ku tademaw, nu Kalingkuay kenis a tademaw sakatusa nu tabakiay a tuse, u tademaw uyni dada' Kalingkuay nu hamin nu kanatal sakatuuday kenis a tademaw. ayzaay tu mihcaan Kalingku a sebu atu Taiwan Land Development Corporation (TLDCŚŹįťĖčťõÜŚúė) saicelang sa palahat tu nutimulan Yusinu atu Kuan-hua-kung-ye-ci a kakitizaan, imahini maleku tu ku baluhay kapahay a idangan atu Huo-kuy Starbucks , VIESHOW CINEMAS , Huy-lan-wan a kakitizaan baluhay a tuse kenis malekutuay, paliayaw nizateng tu sakay nutimulan nuwamisan tu Yusinu balecad a malahat, mikelid tu satabakiay tu pipadang. hekal a lala' Ji'an/Yusinu a kenis hekal a lala pakala tu 15%, nuzuma 85% nu Yusinu a sauwac atu Mu-kua a sauwac masaupu masaenal,ahebal ku lala' masaenal, demiad tungus u kacacaledesay kabalian tu a demiad, labu nu kenis tademaw pasu layak, ngayngay, hulan, yincumin sepat ku tabakiay kasabinacadan, nilaculan anu canancanan nikalukan atu kusi misubayay a kawaw malecd tu macakat, tuse a kakitizaan u Kalingku malalutin tu makakat, kalankag kunikalahad, izaw ku Nuovo cinema Paradiso , VIESHOW CINEMAS , Huo-kuy Starbucks , McDonald's atu Poya sen-hou-kuan kenis a taduduan malalutin tu sapaliway a kawaw micumud tu pacakayay tu pabaliway. Ji'an/Yusinu i kasumamadan a Amis nu yincumin liwliw a pisakakawan , malumanay a ngangan "Cikasuan", u kamu nu Pangcah "Cikasoyay" katuudan a kakitizaan, nu Pangcah sakalima tabakiay a binacadan u Cikasuan han a kenis, Lilaw a kenis, Nadawlan a kenis, PukPuk' a kenis, pikuwanan henay nu Lipun a zitay, Cikasuan a kawaw hawsa, Cakasuan malasawad tu, 1910 a mihcaan Lipun Taywan sakakaay nu zebu paicelang tu Lipun pabulaw tu tademaw i Kalinku a kakitizaan, satu mili-yung tu Cakasuan patizang tu nu umahay, Cikasuan a niyazu'', tulu kuni kasiniyazu' nuayawan a a Yusinu, Tay-cang, Cing-bung, Pay-an, Sin-suay, Bu-sin, Taw-sian, Caw-ben, Yung-sin. 1920 a mihcaan tungusy nu Ci-ye kakitizaan Ci-ye a niyazu' nu Ping-ye a kenis "Lidaw, Natawlan, Puhpuh, 1937 a mihcaan nuwalian a kakitizaan pasumat tu lekec Ci-ye a kakitizaan papulung han tunu ayawan tuluay nipazengan tabakiay nisulitan Ci-ye-cang, Ci-ye, Nan-pu, Tan-pu, Cou-cin, makakenis panukas tu Kalinku a pikawawan a kakitizaan Kalingku a sakuwan "Cang-ting", zikuzan nu ngangayaw saayaway unian a ngangan, patizang Kalingku a kenis Ci-ye a niyazu' , nika zayhan mitapal tu, Ci-ye tusaay a sulit masaLipun kuyni kamu, kilul i 1948 a mihcaan ngangan Ji'an/Yusinu a kenis han katukuh ayza. tademaw pulung tuni sulitan katukuh i 2020ŚĻī12śúą a buladan, Ji'an/Yusinu a kenis u tademaw tu piasip 83,507 ku tademaw, kakatuud pakala tu 1,280 ku tademaw/km¬≤, nu hamin nu kanatal u sakatuuday a tademaw, sakapitu talakaway katuuday a kenis nu tademaw. caculilan Ji'an/Yusinu a kenis tini i Taywan Hua-lien a kenis nuwalian a sahedung tu nuwalian nuamisan a masaenalay saamisan micapi tu Hua-lien tuse, muwalibayu, satipan belaw u Siw-lin a kenis, nutimulan patatules nu Sou-bung a kenis, zayhan macapi ku Hua-lien kenis lihalay ku caculilan, micaliway tu silamalay Tay-tung a zazan atu Hua-lien a basu, Tay siwa a zazan, Tay sabaw cacay. silamalay a zazan i tini patizeng tu silamalay a Ji'an/Yusinu pangicuwan, basu a zazan kazizeng makay a Hua-lien a silamalay malingatu izaw ku Tay siwa a zazaan, Tay siwa pin, Tay sabawcacay a zazan, Hua-lien masahelungay pulung walu ku kazizengay a kapulungan a pihalhalan tu kazizeng , binawlan taneng mikakaw tu tabakiay miculuay taneng aca makay Hua-lien silamalay micaliw tu o-tu-bay atu batikal a tayza. nilaculan Ji'an/Yusinu a kenis tini i Mu-ka a sauwac atu Ji'an/Yusinu a sauwac tu masaupuay macebalay, ahebal ku masaenalay a hekal, taneng a kalukan ku lala' pakala tu lima a malebut kung-cin kaahebal, nu Hua-lin a kenis u anganagan nu malukay palumaan a lala', paluma tu tipus tubah tamulak kuhkuh sicedamay a daydan u teluc nu puki, u kulang atu caay ka yadah ku heci, uzauma u tali mahamin nu kanatal sakasepat sakayadahay nipalumaan a kakitizaan, u teluc nu puki, u saayaway kayadahay a nipalumaan nu kakitizaan hekal nu sapaluma macalap ku hamin nu Taywan 43%. tademaw a laylay Ji'an/Yusinu a kenis kasaupu nu binacadan pasu Layak a datemaw Layakay, Naynayan, Hulan, Amis atu Truku kutademaw, kasabinacadan masungaay a mapulung niak izaw kunuuzipan a lisin, caay kapiduduc tunu Layak a lisin, tuway tiniay a lalangawan masumad sangalep kayadah ku lalangawan. Kahulaman tu Kang-si tulu bataan izaw ku lima a mihcaan "celacan tu 1696 a mihcaan" tahkal i cudad "Taywan-bu-ze", nisulitan tu ce-ciw-suan-se-cung, mala u Ji'an/Yusinu lalabu u saayaway nisulitan i layly a cudan nu Yin-cu-min. tuud haku a Sing-ba-ke nisangaan a panan u singanganay nu misangaay a saydang a Lipun ci Wey-yan-wu u misaayaway a misanga', pakabayu mahamin nu kanatal kasatabakiay a minatu tu 29 a tuud a haku uangangan a sapisanga' a zayliyaw, pabeli tu baluhay a nikauzip, a patatungus han papulung a mapatungtuh tu tuud a haku mala tukinihay a Kin-ce-ta-sin, sakahuan-baw atu ayungan tu micidekay a nisangaan. tuud a haku pulung sepat a tatungduh ka talakaw, nika nu pahan tusa katadungduh dada', sakatulu sakasepat a tadungduh u pisanga' u sakakazalian dada'. u nipalumaan tali may-kuy lan-hua cyw-cay sicedamay a daydan deluc nu buki ciy-ye a belac kulang

(kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti * km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti *.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, **,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, **,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, **,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paŇč ¶ańß, truku) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u tad…ômaw ir~…ĺabu nu sijaŇč u pajr~…ĺaŇč ku ar~…ĺumanaj. nikasakuwakuwan *i Ē~ °an ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, tan…ôŇč a kar~…ĺukan ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° pakar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a mar~…ĺ…ôbut kuŇč- ¶in kaańß…ôbar~…ĺ, nu ńßua-r~…ĺin a k…ônis u aŇčanagan nu mar~…ĺukaj par~…ĺumaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, par~…ĺuma tu tipus tubańß tamur~…ĺak kuńßkuńß si ¶…ôdamaj a dajdan u t…ôr~…ĺu ¶ nu puki, u kur~…ĺaŇč atu ¶aaj ka jadańß ku ńß…ô ¶i, uzauma u tar~…ĺi mańßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ sakas…ôpat sakajadańßaj nipar~…ĺumaan a kakitizaan, u t…ôr~…ĺu ¶ nu puki, u saajawaj kajadańßaj a nipar~…ĺumaan nu kakitizaan ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sapar~…ĺuma ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku ńßamin nu tajwan **%. tad…ômaw a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj *i Ē~ °an/jusinu a k…ônis kasaupu nu bina ¶adan pasu r~…ĺajak a dat…ômaw r~…ĺajakaj, najnajan, ńßur~…ĺan, amis atu truku kutad…ômaw, kasabina ¶adan masuŇčaaj a mapur~…ĺuŇč niak izaw kunuuzipan a r~…ĺisin, ¶aaj kapidudu ¶ tunu r~…ĺajak a r~…ĺisin, tuwaj tiniaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan masumad saŇčar~…ĺ…ôp kajadańß ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. kańßur~…ĺaman tu kaŇč-si tur~…ĺu bataan izaw ku r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan " ¶…ôr~…ĺa ¶an tu **** a mińß ¶aan" tańßkar~…ĺ i ¶udad "tajwan-bu-z…ô", nisur~…ĺitan tu ¶…ô- ¶iw-suan-s…ô- ¶uŇč, mar~…ĺa u *i Ē~ °an/jusinu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu u saajawaj nisur~…ĺitan i r~…ĺajr~…ĺj a ¶udan nu jin- ¶u-min. tuud ńßaku a siŇč-ba-k…ô nisaŇčaan a panan u siŇčaŇčanaj nu misaŇčaaj a sajdaŇč a r~…ĺipun ¶i w…ô-jan-wu u misaajawaj a misaŇča Ē~ °, pakabaju mańßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ kasatabakiaj a minatu tu ** a tuud a ńßaku uaŇčaŇčan a sapisaŇča Ē~ ° a zajr~…ĺijaw, pab…ôr~…ĺi tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a nikauzip, a patatuŇčus ńßan papur~…ĺuŇč a mapatuŇčtuńß tu tuud a ńßaku mar~…ĺa tukinińßaj a kin- ¶…ô-ta-sin, sakańßuan-baw atu ajuŇčan tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a nisaŇčaan. tuud a ńßaku pur~…ĺuŇč s…ôpat a tatuŇčduńß ka tar~…ĺakaw, nika nu pańßan tusa kataduŇčduńß dada Ē~ °, sakatur~…ĺu sakas…ôpat a taduŇčduńß u pisaŇča Ē~ ° u sakakazar~…ĺian dada Ē~ °. u nipar~…ĺumaan tar~…ĺi maj-kuj r~…ĺan-ńßua ¶jw- ¶aj si ¶…ôdamaj a dajdan d…ôr~…ĺu ¶ nu buki ¶ij-j…ô a b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ kur~…ĺaŇč
S.FORM: Ji'an a sakuwan ku Hualien. kumud nu kalesakan, 62.65 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 0 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 0.68 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 78,633 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 29,613 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 14,299 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 18%(Pangcah, Truku) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. nikasakuwakuwan Ji'an mala 18 a cuwen atu 23 ku niyazu' kina 23 a niyazu'sa, Natawran , Pukpuk , Lidaw , Mabuwakay , Cikasuwan , Isaetipan pahikukian , Isawalian pahikukian , Taracan , Citekudan , Cikeliwan , Atonan , Ciripunan , Sarad , Kungkung , Hacining , Fulufuluan , Alang gnaalu , Alang mkibuhw , Alang kiyumi , Alang miyamay , Buner , Sirakesay , Ciyibangcalay . Ji'an/Yusinu (ťėŅÁĺéŤ™ě:CikasuanÔľõŤáļÁĀ£Ť©Ī:Kiat-an-hiongÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:gidňč onňä hiongňä,śĶ∑ťôłŤÖĒ:gid onňč hiongňč) . Ji'an/Yusinu , pangangan ku Cikasuan tu Pangcah/Amis, panagangan ku Kiat-an-hiong tu Taywan a tademaw, pangangan ku gidňč onňä hiongňä tu se-sing-cang a kamu nu ngayngay , pangangan ku gid onňč hiongňč tu hay-lu a kamu nu ngayngay , tini i Taywan Kalinku a kenis nuwalian tu saamisan, nuwamisan micapi tu Kalinku a tuse, Walibatu satipan belaw u Siu-lin-siang nutimulan matatules nu Sou-bung-siang . lalabuay a tademaw pakala tu 8.4 a mang ku tademaw, nu Kalingkuay kenis a tademaw sakatusa nu tabakiay a tuse, u tademaw uyni dada' Kalingkuay nu hamin nu kanatal sakatuuday kenis a tademaw. ayzaay tu mihcaan Kalingku a sebu atu Taiwan Land Development Corporation (TLDCŚŹįťĖčťõÜŚúė) saicelang sa palahat tu nutimulan Yusinu atu Kuan-hua-kung-ye-ci a kakitizaan, imahini maleku tu ku baluhay kapahay a idangan atu Huo-kuy Starbucks , VIESHOW CINEMAS , Huy-lan-wan a kakitizaan baluhay a tuse kenis malekutuay, paliayaw nizateng tu sakay nutimulan nuwamisan tu Yusinu balecad a malahat, mikelid tu satabakiay tu pipadang. hekal a lala' Ji'an/Yusinu a kenis hekal a lala pakala tu 15%, nuzuma 85% nu Yusinu a sauwac atu Mu-kua a sauwac masaupu masaenal,ahebal ku lala' masaenal, demiad tungus u kacacaledesay kabalian tu a demiad, labu nu kenis tademaw pasu layak, ngayngay, hulan, yincumin sepat ku tabakiay kasabinacadan, nilaculan anu canancanan nikalukan atu kusi misubayay a kawaw malecd tu macakat, tuse a kakitizaan u Kalingku malalutin tu makakat, kalankag kunikalahad, izaw ku Nuovo cinema Paradiso , VIESHOW CINEMAS , Huo-kuy Starbucks , McDonald's atu Poya sen-hou-kuan kenis a taduduan malalutin tu sapaliway a kawaw micumud tu pacakayay tu pabaliway. Ji'an/Yusinu i kasumamadan a Amis nu yincumin liwliw a pisakakawan , malumanay a ngangan "Cikasuan", u kamu nu Pangcah "Cikasoyay" katuudan a kakitizaan, nu Pangcah sakalima tabakiay a binacadan u Cikasuan han a kenis, Lilaw a kenis, Nadawlan a kenis, PukPuk' a kenis, pikuwanan henay nu Lipun a zitay, Cikasuan a kawaw hawsa, Cakasuan malasawad tu, 1910 a mihcaan Lipun Taywan sakakaay nu zebu paicelang tu Lipun pabulaw tu tademaw i Kalinku a kakitizaan, satu mili-yung tu Cakasuan patizang tu nu umahay, Cikasuan a niyazu'', tulu kuni kasiniyazu' nuayawan a a Yusinu, Tay-cang, Cing-bung, Pay-an, Sin-suay, Bu-sin, Taw-sian, Caw-ben, Yung-sin. 1920 a mihcaan tungusy nu Ci-ye kakitizaan Ci-ye a niyazu' nu Ping-ye a kenis "Lidaw, Natawlan, Puhpuh, 1937 a mihcaan nuwalian a kakitizaan pasumat tu lekec Ci-ye a kakitizaan papulung han tunu ayawan tuluay nipazengan tabakiay nisulitan Ci-ye-cang, Ci-ye, Nan-pu, Tan-pu, Cou-cin, makakenis panukas tu Kalinku a pikawawan a kakitizaan Kalingku a sakuwan "Cang-ting", zikuzan nu ngangayaw saayaway unian a ngangan, patizang Kalingku a kenis Ci-ye a niyazu' , nika zayhan mitapal tu, Ci-ye tusaay a sulit masaLipun kuyni kamu, kilul i 1948 a mihcaan ngangan Ji'an/Yusinu a kenis han katukuh ayza. tademaw pulung tuni sulitan katukuh i 2020ŚĻī12śúą a buladan, Ji'an/Yusinu a kenis u tademaw tu piasip 83,507 ku tademaw, kakatuud pakala tu 1,280 ku tademaw/km¬≤, nu hamin nu kanatal u sakatuuday a tademaw, sakapitu talakaway katuuday a kenis nu tademaw. caculilan Ji'an/Yusinu a kenis tini i Taywan Hua-lien a kenis nuwalian a sahedung tu nuwalian nuamisan a masaenalay saamisan micapi tu Hua-lien tuse, muwalibayu, satipan belaw u Siw-lin a kenis, nutimulan patatules nu Sou-bung a kenis, zayhan macapi ku Hua-lien kenis lihalay ku caculilan, micaliway tu silamalay Tay-tung a zazan atu Hua-lien a basu, Tay siwa a zazan, Tay sabaw cacay. silamalay a zazan i tini patizeng tu silamalay a Ji'an/Yusinu pangicuwan, basu a zazan kazizeng makay a Hua-lien a silamalay malingatu izaw ku Tay siwa a zazaan, Tay siwa pin, Tay sabawcacay a zazan, Hua-lien masahelungay pulung walu ku kazizengay a kapulungan a pihalhalan tu kazizeng , binawlan taneng mikakaw tu tabakiay miculuay taneng aca makay Hua-lien silamalay micaliw tu o-tu-bay atu batikal a tayza. nilaculan Ji'an/Yusinu a kenis tini i Mu-ka a sauwac atu Ji'an/Yusinu a sauwac tu masaupuay macebalay, ahebal ku masaenalay a hekal, taneng a kalukan ku lala' pakala tu lima a malebut kung-cin kaahebal, nu Hua-lin a kenis u anganagan nu malukay palumaan a lala', paluma tu tipus tubah tamulak kuhkuh sicedamay a daydan u teluc nu puki, u kulang atu caay ka yadah ku heci, uzauma u tali mahamin nu kanatal sakasepat sakayadahay nipalumaan a kakitizaan, u teluc nu puki, u saayaway kayadahay a nipalumaan nu kakitizaan hekal nu sapaluma macalap ku hamin nu Taywan 43%. tademaw a laylay Ji'an/Yusinu a kenis kasaupu nu binacadan pasu Layak a datemaw Layakay, Naynayan, Hulan, Amis atu Truku kutademaw, kasabinacadan masungaay a mapulung niak izaw kunuuzipan a lisin, caay kapiduduc tunu Layak a lisin, tuway tiniay a lalangawan masumad sangalep kayadah ku lalangawan. Kahulaman tu Kang-si tulu bataan izaw ku lima a mihcaan "celacan tu 1696 a mihcaan" tahkal i cudad "Taywan-bu-ze", nisulitan tu ce-ciw-suan-se-cung, mala u Ji'an/Yusinu lalabu u saayaway nisulitan i layly a cudan nu Yin-cu-min. tuud haku a Sing-ba-ke nisangaan a panan u singanganay nu misangaay a saydang a Lipun ci Wey-yan-wu u misaayaway a misanga', pakabayu mahamin nu kanatal kasatabakiay a minatu tu 29 a tuud a haku uangangan a sapisanga' a zayliyaw, pabeli tu baluhay a nikauzip, a patatungus han papulung a mapatungtuh tu tuud a haku mala tukinihay a Kin-ce-ta-sin, sakahuan-baw atu ayungan tu micidekay a nisangaan. tuud a haku pulung sepat a tatungduh ka talakaw, nika nu pahan tusa katadungduh dada', sakatulu sakasepat a tadungduh u pisanga' u sakakazalian dada'. u nipalumaan tali may-kuy lan-hua cyw-cay sicedamay a daydan deluc nu buki ciy-ye a belac kulang

sakańßuan-baw atu ajuŇčan tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a nisaŇčaan. tuud a ńßaku pur~…ĺuŇč s…ôpat a tatuŇčduńß ka tar~…ĺakaw, nika nu pańßan tusa kataduŇčduńß dada Ē~ °, sakatur~…ĺu sakas…ôpat a taduŇčduńß u pisaŇča Ē~ ° u sakakazar~…ĺian dada Ē~ °. u nipar~…ĺumaan tar~…ĺi maj-kuj r~…ĺan-ńßua ¶jw- ¶aj si ¶…ôdamaj a dajdan d…ôr~…ĺu ¶ nu buki ¶ij-j…ô a b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ kur~…ĺaŇč
